methods.description: Procedures for obtaining DNA from cultured trypanosomes and blood samples for subsequent genetic analysis.

steps.description: DNA preparations from cultured trypanosomes were obtained using the classical phenol-chloroform method.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract DNA from cultured trypanosomes using phenol-chloroform method

steps.description: The DNA preparations from blood samples were obtained from samples preserved in ethanol (v/v) stored in our Blood Sample Collections (BSC).
steps.searchable_summary: Extract DNA from blood samples preserved in ethanol
inputs: Blood samples preserved in ethanol (from BSC)

methods.description: PCR amplification and sequencing of the V7V8 region of SSU rRNA and glycosomal glyceraldehyde phosphate dehydrogenase (gGAPDH) genes.

steps.description: PCR-amplification ... of the V7V8 region of SSU rRNA ... and glycosomal glyceraldehyde phosphate dehydrogenase (gGAPDH) genes were performed as described previously [37,38].
steps.searchable_summary: Perform PCR amplification of V7V8 SSU rRNA and gGAPDH genes
outputs: Amplified V7V8 SSU rRNA gene fragments

steps.description: ... and sequencing of the V7V8 region of SSU rRNA ... and glycosomal glyceraldehyde phosphate dehydrogenase (gGAPDH) genes were performed as described previously [37,38]. The sequences obtained were employed for the following phylogenetic analyses...
steps.searchable_summary: Sequence amplified V7V8 SSU rRNA and gGAPDH gene fragments
inputs: Amplified V7V8 SSU rRNA gene fragments

methods.description: Phylogenetic analysis using obtained V7V8 SSU rRNA and gGAPDH sequences, including sequence selection, alignment, and tree building methods (Parsimony, Maximum Likelihood, Bayesian Inference).

steps.description: The sequences obtained were employed for the following phylogenetic analyses: a) V7V8 SSU rRNA sequences (880~bp) from the crocodilian trypanosomes; b) gGAPDH sequences (864 bp) from the crocodilian trypanosomes and species representing all major clades within Trypanosoma using non-trypanosome trypanosomatids as an outgroup; and c) concatenated V7V8 SSU rRNA and gGAPDH sequences (~3.3 kb) from the crocodilian trypanosomes and their closest related trypanosomes. The species included in the phylogenetic trees and their respective GenBank accession numbers are shown in in the phylogenetic trees and Table 1.
steps.searchable_summary: Select and organize sequences for phylogenetic analysis, including obtaining reference sequences and accession numbers
inputs: Obtained V7V8 SSU rRNA sequences (from Gene Amplification and Sequencing method)
Obtained gGAPDH sequences (from Gene Amplification and Sequencing method)
outputs: Organized sequence datasets for different analyses (V7V8, gGAPDH, concatenated)

steps.description: The alignments were employed for Parsimony (V7V8 SSU rRNA), maximum likelihood (ML) and Bayesian inference (BI) analyses as previously described [15,19,21,37,38].
steps.searchable_summary: Perform sequence alignments for phylogenetic analysis

steps.description: ...Parsimony (V7V8 SSU rRNA)... analyses as previously described [15,19,21,37,38].
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Parsimony phylogenetic analysis on the V7V8 SSU rRNA alignment
inputs: Aligned V7V8 SSU rRNA dataset (from Step 2)

steps.description: ...and Bayesian inference (BI) analyses as previously described [15,19,21,37,38].
